segments.text: Look at this. So for the most beautiful vitamin I've ever seen, but fancy medicine. Is it even practical? It turns out the beauty is actually the function.
Here's the thing. Standard vitamins have a flaw. They often dissolve too early right in your stomach acid which kills the nutrients. So this company built
time release system. The outer shell dissolves first releasing the oil. But those pretty floating beads, they are designed to survive the acid and only
open later in your intestines where you actually absorb the nutrients. Also,
this design is very honest. Standard vitamins hide everything behind a white coating. This just removes the curtain.
You can visualize what you're putting into your body. Multivitamin, multiple types of beads, bone support, omega plus other minerals. You'll automatically
trust this more. To see more amazing products, subscribe.
